rulings.Rulings: CONTINUED TO 3/6/02 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (GK(EX)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. MERCHANDISE CARD NOT ILLEGAL GIFT CERTIFICATE BECAUSE EXCEPTION PURSUANT TO 1749(C) APPLIES - 17200 CLAIMS DENIED QUESTION OF WHETHER PRACTICE IS UNFAIR OR MISLEADING INVOLVES TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT. (CW)

OVERRULED AS TO RAUL'S CLAIMS. OVERRULED AS TO ANA'S CLAIMS IF ANA AND/OR COUNSEL PROVIDE A DECLARATION EXPLAINING THE NEWLY MINTED CIVIL FORFEITURE ALLEGATIONS AND WHY NOT ALLEGED PREVIOUSLY SEE TOSTEVIN V. DOUGLAS, (1958) 160 CAL.APP.2ND 321, 331; OWENS V. KINGS SUPERMARKET, (1988) 198 CAL.APP.3D 379, 384; J.A. SAVAGE V. PG&E, (1993) 21 CAL.APP.4TH 434, 441. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: ZEN AUTUMN LOVETT-BELAMY VS. ELIZABETH Q LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES DENIED CLAIM OF FRAUD AND BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY SUFFICIENT. MOTION TO STRIKE ATTORNEY FEES OFF CALENDAR - NO PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY FEES. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: ZEN AUTUMN LOVETT-BELAMY VS. ELIZABETH Q LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION CONSPIRACY, CIVIL SECTION 1714.10 OVERRULED INDEPENDENT DUTY SEE EVIDENCE CODE 951 BERRY VS. CHAPLIN (1946) 74 CAL.APP.2ND 652, 657. DEMURRER OVERRULED 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD ALLEGATIONS RE MISREPRESENTATION TO COURT SUFFICIENT. DEMURRER OVERRULED 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY ALLEGATIONS OF ATTORNEY CLIENT RELATIONSHIP SUFFICIENT. DEMURRER OVERRULED 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE, PLAINTIFFS ARE DEFENDANTS CLIENT. DEMURRER CONVERSION OFF CALENDAR CAUSE OF ACTION NOT ASSERTED AGAINST ATTORNEY. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO EMOTIONAL DISTRESS DAMAGES. BREACH OF DUTY OF ATTORNEY TO CLIENT WILL SUPPORT EMOTIONAL DISTRESS UNDER CIRCUMSTANCES ALLEGED. DEMURRER TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION PROBATE SECTION 2619.5 SUSTAINED - STATUTE HAS BEEN REPEALED. DEMURRER TO 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION B&P SECTION 17200 OVERRULED APPLICATION OF LITIGATION PRIVILEGE IS QUESTION OF FACT. (CW)
